steps.t: Falch Gurth can be found to the south of Taen Orwath. Cuilion has asked you to enter Falch Gurth and learn what has become of Nidhlas and his men.
Falch Gurth can be found to the south of Taen Orwath. You have entered Falch Gurth in search of Nidhlas and his men. You should continue searching for…
The source of the voices seems to be coming from a raised cleft within Falch Gurth. While exploring Falch Gurth, you overheard hushed voices from the …
Taurdir can be found at Torgris. You have discovered a small encampment of Rangers within a cleft of Falch Gurth. You should talk to Taurdir.
